persona.name: Carlos Silva
persona.lifestyle: High-income business consultant, luxury traveler, executive-level expectations

health_concerns: Hypertension (elevated after Tokyo incident - increased medication)

persona.travel_frequency: Extremely frequent business travel (156 days/year) to high-cost locations
